languages.text: {n}Брови полковника начинают приподниматься, но тут снова возвращаются в суровую складку.{/n} "Зачем нам такие подачки? Это вы так{mf|ой|ая} добр{mf|ый|ая}, а что будет через десять лет? Через сто? Нам придется уповать на доброту вашего наследника? Уж лучше сразу показать мне и моим солдатам наше место, чем потом отбирать то, к чему мы привыкнем".

{n}The colonel' eyebrows raise for a moment before returning to a stern scowl.{/n} "What use do we have for such handouts? You're kind enough, but what happens in ten years? A hundred? Can we rely on the kindness of your heir? Better to show me and my soldiers our place right now than to strip away what we've grown used to later."
languages.original_text: {n}Брови полковника начинают приподниматься, но тут снова возвращаются в суровую складку.{/n} "Зачем нам такие подачки? Это вы так{mf|ой|ая} добр{mf|ый|ая}, а что будет через десять лет? Через сто? Нам придется уповать на доброту вашего наследника? Уж лучше сразу показать мне и моим солдатам наше место, чем потом отбирать то, к чему мы привыкнем".

traits.locale_text: {n}The colonel' eyebrows lift for a moment before returning to a stern scowl.{/n} "What use have we for such handouts? You're kind enough, but what happens in ten years? A hundred? Are we to rely on the kindness of your heir? Better to show me and my soldiers our place right now than to strip away what we've grown accustomed to later."

{n}The colonel' eyebrows raise for a moment before returning to a stern scowl.{/n} "What use do we have for such handouts? You're kind enough, but what happens in ten years? A hundred? Can we rely on the kindness of your heir? Better to show me and my soldiers our place right now than to strip away what we've grown used to later."

"A little? So that's how the whole system works. And people's lives depend on the goodwill of a few idealists. Very few, I reckon. Well, then, I suppose I was right about the whole thing — we're just lucky to have you."

{n}The colonel' eyebrows lift for a moment before returning to a stern scowl.{/n} "What use have we for such handouts? You're kind enough, but what happens in ten years? A hundred? Are we to rely on the kindness of your heir? Better to show me and my soldiers our place right now than to strip away what we've grown accustomed to later."

{n}The colonel' eyebrows raise for a moment before returning to a stern scowl.{/n} "What use do we have for such handouts? You're kind enough, but what happens in ten years? A hundred? Can we rely on the kindness of your heir? Better to show me and my soldiers our place right now than to strip away what we've grown used to later."

languages.text: 「少し？だから、このシステム全体がそう動いているんだ。そして、人々の生活は、理想主義者の善意に委ねられている。理想主義者は、ほんのわずかだ。そう思う。では、このシステム全体について、私が正しいと判断したことになる。あなたたちのおかげで、私たちは幸運に恵まれているのだ」
languages.original_text: "A little? So that's how the whole system works. And people's lives depend on the goodwill of a few idealists. Very few, I reckon. Well, then, I suppose I was right about the whole thing — we're just lucky to have you."

languages.text: {n}Albayın kaşları bir anlığına kalkıyor, ardından tekrar sert bir şekilde çatılıyor.{/n} "Böyle sadakalar ne işimize yarar? Yeterince naziksiniz ama on yıl sonra ne olacak? Yüz yıl sonra? Vârisinizin nezaketine güvenebilir miyiz? Sonradan alıştığımız şeyleri elimizden almaktansa bana ve askerlerime yerimizi şimdiden göstermeniz daha iyi."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel' eyebrows raise for a moment before returning to a stern scowl.{/n} "What use do we have for such handouts? You're kind enough, but what happens in ten years? A hundred? Can we rely on the kindness of your heir? Better to show me and my soldiers our place right now than to strip away what we've grown used to later."

traits.locale_text: {n}Albayın kaşları bir anlığına kalkıyor, ardından tekrar sert bir şekilde çatılıyor.{/n} "Böyle sadakalar ne işimize yarar? Yeterince naziksiniz ama on yıl sonra ne olacak? Yüz yıl sonra? Vârisinizin nezaketine güvenebilir miyiz? Sonradan alıştığımız şeyleri elimizden almaktansa bana ve askerlerime yerimizi şimdiden göstermeniz daha iyi."

languages.text: {n}上校挑了一下眉毛，随后又恢复了严厉的神情。{/n}“这种施舍对我们有什么用？您是好心没错，但十年后呢？一百年后呢？我们能指望您的继承人也这样好心吗？与其日后剥夺我们已经习惯的一切，不如现在就让我和我的士兵明白自己的位置。”
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel' eyebrows raise for a moment before returning to a stern scowl.{/n} "What use do we have for such handouts? You're kind enough, but what happens in ten years? A hundred? Can we rely on the kindness of your heir? Better to show me and my soldiers our place right now than to strip away what we've grown used to later."

traits.locale_text: {n}上校挑了一下眉毛，随后又恢复了严厉的神情。{/n}“这种施舍对我们有什么用？您是好心没错，但十年后呢？一百年后呢？我们能指望您的继承人也这样好心吗？与其日后剥夺我们已经习惯的一切，不如现在就让我和我的士兵明白自己的位置。”

languages.text: {n}Der Colonel hebt kurz die Brauen, ehe sein mürrischer Gesichtsausdruck zurückkehrt.{/n} "Was nützt uns das? Ihr seid in Ordnung, aber was passiert in zehn Jahren? In hundert? Können wir uns auf die Güte Eures Erben verlassen? Zeigt mir und meinen Leuten lieber jetzt unseren Platz, anstatt ihn uns zu nehmen, wenn wir uns an ihn gewöhnt haben."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel' eyebrows raise for a moment before returning to a stern scowl.{/n} "What use do we have for such handouts? You're kind enough, but what happens in ten years? A hundred? Can we rely on the kindness of your heir? Better to show me and my soldiers our place right now than to strip away what we've grown used to later."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Colonel hebt kurz die Brauen, ehe sein mürrischer Gesichtsausdruck zurückkehrt.{/n} "Was nützt uns das? Ihr seid in Ordnung, aber was passiert in zehn Jahren? In hundert? Können wir uns auf die Güte Eures Erben verlassen? Zeigt mir und meinen Leuten lieber jetzt unseren Platz, anstatt ihn uns zu nehmen, wenn wir uns an ihn gewöhnt haben."

languages.text: {n}Le colonel hausse les sourcils un moment avant de les froncer à nouveau.{/n} « Et que nous vaut une telle générosité ? Que se passera-t-il dans dix ans ? Ou dans un siècle ? Pourrons-nous compter sur la bonté de vos héritiers ? Je préfère que nous comprenions quelle est notre place dès maintenant, plutôt qu'être privés de certains privilèges plus tard. »
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel' eyebrows raise for a moment before returning to a stern scowl.{/n} "What use do we have for such handouts? You're kind enough, but what happens in ten years? A hundred? Can we rely on the kindness of your heir? Better to show me and my soldiers our place right now than to strip away what we've grown used to later."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le colonel hausse les sourcils un moment avant de les froncer à nouveau.{/n} « Et que nous vaut une telle générosité ? Que se passera-t-il dans dix ans ? Ou dans un siècle ? Pourrons-nous compter sur la bonté de vos héritiers ? Je préfère que nous comprenions quelle est notre place dès maintenant, plutôt qu'être privés de certains privilèges plus tard. »

languages.text: {n}Las cejas del coronel se arquean por un momento antes de retomar su habitual fruncimiento.{/n} «¿De qué nos sirven las limosnas? Es muy generoso por su parte, pero ¿qué ocurrirá en diez años? ¿Y en cien? ¿Podemos confiar en la bondad de quien l{mf|e|a} suceda? Prefiero que nos enseñe nuestro lugar a mis soldados y a mí ahora a que más adelante nos arrebate todo a lo que nos hemos acostumbrado».
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel' eyebrows raise for a moment before returning to a stern scowl.{/n} "What use do we have for such handouts? You're kind enough, but what happens in ten years? A hundred? Can we rely on the kindness of your heir? Better to show me and my soldiers our place right now than to strip away what we've grown used to later."

Es muy generoso por su parte, pero ¿qué ocurrirá en diez años? ¿Y en cien? ¿Podemos confiar en la bondad de quien l{mf|e|a} suceda? Prefiero que nos enseñe nuestro lugar a mis soldados y a mí ahora a que más adelante nos arrebate todo a lo que nos hemos acostumbrado».
